name: Blue dot
tagline: AI tax compliance engine for employee benefits and global operations
description:
Blue dot is an AI-powered platform that automates tax compliance for employee spending, benefits, and cross-border transactions. It continuously analyzes financial data against constantly updated local tax regulations in over 100 countries. The tool identifies tax-deductible expenses, ensures accurate VAT/GST recovery, and flags potential compliance risks in real-time, significantly reducing manual work and errors.

Key features include real-time policy validation, which checks each expense against relevant tax laws as it is submitted, and automated audit trails that document every decision for simplified reporting. It also provides jurisdiction-specific guidance, helping teams navigate complex regional rules. The platform is designed for finance and tax teams within companies that operate across multiple countries, particularly those in sectors with high employee spending or complex benefit structures like professional services, manufacturing, and technology.

A clear use case is managing a global sales team’s travel and client entertainment expenses. Blue dot automatically categorizes each receipt, applies the correct tax treatment for meals or mileage in each country, identifies recoverable VAT, and ensures all deductions are properly documented for year-end filing. The main benefit is a more efficient, accurate, and defensible compliance process, freeing finance teams to focus on strategic tasks rather than manual data review.
